chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.D-34 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For non-prosecution 13-03-2024 None present for the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G. ***** None present for the applicant. No intimation is received so far. Even otherwise, the office objections have not been complied with by the applicant. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
